description: As an administrator (admin/Admin1234!), create a 'Page' resource in the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course. Name the resource 'Supplementary Video: Cell Theory' and include the embedded video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8IlzKri08kk and the text 'Watch this video to understand the basics of cell theory.' in the page content.

metadata.expected_text: Watch this video to understand the basics of cell theory
